---
title: "Data & Tools"
---

This page highlights infrastructure I have helped build for the field, including open demographic databases, analytical R packages, and publicly available teaching resources.

## R packages

I develop and maintain R tools for demographic analysis and simulation:

- `Rcompadre`: an R interface to the COMPADRE and COMADRE databases, enabling users to access, filter, and work with large collections of matrix population models. [GitHub](https://github.com/jonesor/Rcompadre) | [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=Rcompadre)
- `Rage`: tools for calculating life-history traits from matrix population models, including survival, reproductive, and life-table analyses. [GitHub](https://github.com/jonesor/Rage) | [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=Rage)
- `mpmsim`: tools for simulating matrix population models under user-defined demographic scenarios for teaching, sensitivity analysis, and methods development. [GitHub](https://github.com/jonesor/mpmsim) | [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=mpmsim)

## Demographic databases

COMPADRE (plants) and COMADRE (animals) are open, curated repositories of matrix population models used in comparative demography worldwide. I have co-led both projects since 2010. Together they contain thousands of population models from hundreds of species and underpin a large and growing body of comparative demographic research. Access both databases at [compadre-db.org](https://compadre-db.org).

## Open science and archived code

Code and software are maintained openly through GitHub repositories, and project outputs are archived where possible to support reproducibility and reuse. See [GitHub](https://github.com/jonesor) for current repositories.

## Teaching books and apps

Open teaching resources are available for:

- Population Biology and Evolution: [Book](https://jonesor.github.io/BB512_Book/) | [Shiny apps](https://jonesor.shinyapps.io/bb512suite/)
- Data Handling, Visualisation and Statistics: [Book](https://jonesor.github.io/BB852_Book/) | [Shiny apps](https://jonesor.shinyapps.io/bb852suite/)
